RULING:
No appearances on this matter. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK., N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: SUSTAINED with 10 days leave to amend. Court will note, however, Plainiff is responsible to plead causes of action that do not run afoul of the California Statutory Authority. Prevailing party to submit proposed form of order.
